name: bulk-rnaseq
tagline: Orchestrates bulk RNA-seq end-to-end: FASTQ QC/trim, STAR/Salmon alignment/quant, counts matrix, then hands off to DESeq2, enrichment, and f
verdict: Clean, well-scoped bioinformatics workflow skill. No credential or secret access, no piped/obfuscated shell execution, no destructive ops. Installs come from standard, pinned PyPI/bioconda/nf-core sources with reproducibility emphasized throughout.
